domain: Retail and e-commerce operations including transactions, customers, products, stores, and returns

c_customer_sk.description: A unique surrogate key identifying each customer in the database.

c_customer_id.description: A unique alphanumeric identifier for the customer, likely a business key.

c_current_cdemo_sk.description: A foreign key referencing the demographic information for the customer.

c_current_hdemo_sk.description: A foreign key referencing the household demographic information for the customer.

c_current_addr_sk.description: A foreign key referencing the current address of the customer.

c_first_shipto_date_sk.description: A foreign key referencing the date when the customer's first order was shipped.

c_first_sales_date_sk.description: A foreign key referencing the date of the customer's very first sale or transaction.

c_salutation.description: The formal title or salutation used for the customer (e.g., Mr., Ms., Dr.).

c_first_name.description: The given name of the customer.

c_last_name.description: The family name or surname of the customer.

c_preferred_cust_flag.description: A flag indicating if the customer is designated as a preferred customer, with 'Y' for yes and 'N' for no.

c_birth_day.description: The day of the month on which the customer was born.

c_birth_month.description: The month of the year in which the customer was born.

c_birth_year.description: The four-digit year in which the customer was born.

c_birth_country.description: The country where the customer was born.

c_login.description: The username used by the customer for logging into the system, though often left blank in the sample.

c_email_address.description: The email address associated with the customer's account.

c_last_review_date_sk.description: A foreign key referencing the date of the customer's most recent product or service review.

i_item_sk.description: This is a unique system-generated identifier for each distinct item.

i_item_id.description: This is a unique alphanumeric business identifier for the item.

i_rec_start_date.description: This column indicates the date when the item record became effective.

i_rec_end_date.description: This column indicates the date when the item record ceased to be effective, or is null if it is currently active.

i_item_desc.description: This column contains a detailed textual description of the item.

i_current_price.description: This column represents the current retail price of the item.

i_wholesale_cost.description: This column represents the cost of the item when purchased at wholesale.

i_brand_id.description: This is a unique identifier for the brand of the item.

i_brand.description: This column specifies the name of the brand associated with the item.

i_class_id.description: This is a unique identifier for the product class to which the item belongs.

i_class.description: This column specifies the name of the product class, such as 'mens' or 'rings', that categorizes the item.

i_category_id.description: This is a unique identifier for the product category to which the item belongs.

i_category.description: This column specifies the name of the broad product category, such as 'Shoes' or 'Jewelry', that the item falls under.

i_manufact_id.description: This is a unique identifier for the manufacturer of the item.

i_manufact.description: This column specifies the name of the company that manufactured the item.

i_size.description: This column indicates the size specification of the item, such as 'small', 'large', or 'N/A'.

i_formulation.description: This column appears to be a unique internal code or descriptor related to the item's specific composition or variant.

i_color.description: This column specifies the color of the item.

i_units.description: This column describes the unit of measure or packaging quantity in which the item is sold, such as 'Lb' or 'Carton'.

i_container.description: This column specifies the type of packaging container for the item, though it often indicates 'Unknown'.

i_manager_id.description: This is an identifier for a manager associated with the item or its product line.

i_product_name.description: This column provides the specific marketing name for the product.

ss_sold_date_sk.description: A surrogate key referencing the date dimension table for when the store sale occurred.

ss_sold_time_sk.description: A surrogate key referencing the time dimension table for the specific time of day the store sale occurred.

ss_item_sk.description: A surrogate key referencing the product or item that was sold in the transaction.

ss_customer_sk.description: A surrogate key referencing the customer who made the purchase.

ss_cdemo_sk.description: A surrogate key referencing the customer demographic information associated with the sale.

ss_hdemo_sk.description: A surrogate key referencing the household demographic information associated with the sale.

ss_addr_sk.description: A surrogate key referencing the address information, likely the customer's billing or shipping address, relevant to the sale.

ss_store_sk.description: A surrogate key referencing the physical store location where the transaction took place.

ss_promo_sk.description: A surrogate key referencing the promotion or special offer applied to the sale.

ss_ticket_number.description: The unique identifier for the sales transaction or receipt.

ss_quantity.description: The number of units of a specific item sold in this line item of the transaction.

ss_wholesale_cost.description: The cost of a single unit of the item from the wholesaler to the store.

ss_list_price.description: The original manufacturer's suggested retail price for a single unit of the item.

ss_sales_price.description: The actual unit price at which the item was sold to the customer after any per-unit discounts.

ss_ext_discount_amt.description: The total monetary amount of discounts applied to the line item, prior to any coupon application.

ss_ext_sales_price.description: The total sales price for the line item, calculated as quantity multiplied by the unit sales price.

ss_ext_wholesale_cost.description: The total wholesale cost for all units in the line item, calculated as quantity multiplied by the unit wholesale cost.

ss_ext_list_price.description: The total list price for all units in the line item, calculated as quantity multiplied by the unit list price.

ss_ext_tax.description: The total tax amount applied to the line item.

ss_coupon_amt.description: The total monetary value of coupons applied to this line item.

ss_net_paid.description: The total amount paid by the customer for the line item, excluding tax, after all discounts and coupons.

ss_net_paid_inc_tax.description: The total amount paid by the customer for the line item, including tax, after all discounts and coupons.

ss_net_profit.description: The net profit generated from the sale of the line item, calculated as net paid amount minus the extended wholesale cost.

cs_sold_date_sk.description: A surrogate key referencing the date dimension for when the catalog sale was finalized.

cs_sold_time_sk.description: A surrogate key referencing the time dimension for when the catalog sale was finalized.

cs_ship_date_sk.description: A surrogate key referencing the date dimension for when the ordered items were shipped.

cs_bill_customer_sk.description: A surrogate key referencing the customer dimension for the customer associated with the billing details of the sale.

cs_bill_cdemo_sk.description: A surrogate key referencing the customer demographic dimension for the billing customer.

cs_bill_hdemo_sk.description: A surrogate key referencing the household demographic dimension for the billing customer's household.

cs_bill_addr_sk.description: A surrogate key referencing the address dimension for the billing address of the sale.

cs_ship_customer_sk.description: A surrogate key referencing the customer dimension for the customer receiving the shipment.

cs_ship_cdemo_sk.description: A surrogate key referencing the customer demographic dimension for the shipping customer.

cs_ship_hdemo_sk.description: A surrogate key referencing the household demographic dimension for the shipping customer's household.

cs_ship_addr_sk.description: A surrogate key referencing the address dimension for the shipping address of the sale.

cs_call_center_sk.description: A surrogate key referencing the call center dimension, indicating the call center involved in processing the order.

cs_catalog_page_sk.description: A surrogate key referencing the catalog page dimension, indicating the specific catalog page from which the item was ordered.

cs_ship_mode_sk.description: A surrogate key referencing the shipping mode dimension, indicating the method of shipment for the order.

cs_warehouse_sk.description: A surrogate key referencing the warehouse dimension, indicating the warehouse from which the items were shipped.

cs_item_sk.description: A surrogate key referencing the item dimension, representing the specific product sold in the catalog sale.

cs_promo_sk.description: A surrogate key referencing the promotion dimension, indicating any promotion applied to the sale.

cs_order_number.description: A unique identifier for the specific catalog sales order.

cs_quantity.description: The number of units of the item sold in this specific catalog sales transaction.

cs_wholesale_cost.description: The cost of a single item to the retailer at a wholesale price.

cs_list_price.description: The official advertised or suggested retail price of a single item before any discounts.

cs_sales_price.description: The actual price at which a single item was sold to the customer after any per-unit discounts.

cs_ext_discount_amt.description: The total discount amount applied to the entire quantity of items in this sales line item.

cs_ext_sales_price.description: The total sales price for the entire quantity of a single item in the transaction, typically calculated as quantity multiplied by sales price.

cs_ext_wholesale_cost.description: The total wholesale cost for the entire quantity of a single item in the transaction.

cs_ext_list_price.description: The total list price for the entire quantity of a single item, typically calculated as quantity multiplied by list price.

cs_ext_tax.description: The total tax amount applied to the sales price of the entire quantity of items in this transaction.

cs_coupon_amt.description: The total monetary value of any coupon applied to this specific catalog sale.

cs_ext_ship_cost.description: The total shipping cost incurred for the entire catalog sales order.

cs_net_paid.description: The total amount paid by the customer for the items, net of discounts and coupons, but before tax and shipping.

cs_net_paid_inc_tax.description: The total amount paid by the customer for the items, including tax, but before shipping costs.

cs_net_paid_inc_ship.description: The total amount paid by the customer for the items, including shipping costs, but before tax.

cs_net_paid_inc_ship_tax.description: The final total amount paid by the customer for the catalog sale, including all items, applicable taxes, and shipping costs.

cs_net_profit.description: The net profit generated from the sale of the items, calculated as the net amount paid by the customer for goods minus their total wholesale cost.

d_date_sk.description: A unique integer identifier serving as the primary key for each date record.

d_date_id.description: A unique alphanumeric string identifier for the date record.

d_date.description: The actual calendar date represented by this record.

d_month_seq.description: A sequential number representing the order of the month within a continuous time series.

d_week_seq.description: A sequential number representing the order of the week within a continuous time series.

d_quarter_seq.description: A sequential number representing the order of the quarter within a continuous time series.

d_year.description: The four-digit calendar year of the date.

d_dow.description: The day of the week, represented as an integer (e.g., 0 for Sunday, 1 for Monday).

d_moy.description: The month of the year, represented as an integer from 1 (January) to 12 (December).

d_dom.description: The day of the month, represented as an integer from 1 to 31.

d_qoy.description: The quarter of the year, represented as an integer from 1 to 4.

d_fy_year.description: The fiscal year associated with the date, which may or may not align with the calendar year.

d_fy_quarter_seq.description: A sequential number representing the order of the fiscal quarter within a continuous time series.

d_fy_week_seq.description: A sequential number representing the order of the fiscal week within a continuous time series.

d_day_name.description: The full name of the day of the week (e.g., 'Sunday', 'Monday').

d_quarter_name.description: The name of the calendar quarter, typically including the year (e.g., 'YYYYQ2').

d_holiday.description: A flag indicating whether the date is a holiday ('Y' for yes, 'N' for no).

d_weekend.description: A flag indicating whether the date is considered a weekend day ('Y' for yes, 'N' for no) based on a defined calendar.

d_following_holiday.description: A flag indicating whether the date immediately follows a holiday ('Y' for yes, 'N' for no).

d_first_dom.description: The surrogate key (`d_date_sk`) of the first day of the month for the given date.

d_last_dom.description: The surrogate key (`d_date_sk`) of the last day of the month for the given date.

d_same_day_ly.description: The surrogate key (`d_date_sk`) for the same calendar day in the previous year.

d_same_day_lq.description: The surrogate key (`d_date_sk`) for the same calendar day in the previous quarter.

d_current_day.description: A flag indicating if the date represents the current calendar day ('Y' for yes, 'N' for no).

d_current_week.description: A flag indicating if the date falls within the current calendar week ('Y' for yes, 'N' for no).

d_current_month.description: A flag indicating if the date falls within the current calendar month ('Y' for yes, 'N' for no).

d_current_quarter.description: A flag indicating if the date falls within the current calendar quarter ('Y' for yes, 'N' for no).

d_current_year.description: A flag indicating if the date falls within the current calendar year ('Y' for yes, 'N' for no).

ca_address_sk.description: A unique identifier for each customer address record.

ca_address_id.description: A unique alphanumeric identifier for the customer's address.

ca_street_number.description: The numerical component of the street address.

ca_street_name.description: The proper name of the street without its type.

ca_street_type.description: The classification or type of thoroughfare, such as Street, Road, or Boulevard.

ca_suite_number.description: The specific suite, apartment, or unit number within a building, if applicable.

ca_city.description: The city where the address is located.

ca_county.description: The county or equivalent administrative division where the address is located.

ca_state.description: The two-letter abbreviation for the U.S. state where the address is located.

ca_zip.description: The five-digit U.S. postal zip code for the address.

ca_country.description: The country where the address is located.

ca_gmt_offset.description: The offset in hours from Coordinated Universal Time (UTC) for the address's location.

ca_location_type.description: The classification of the residential property, such as an apartment, condo, or single family home.
